business.name: Raja Plumbing Supplies
business.tagline: Your Local Trade Plumbing Supplies Hub

sample_reviews.author: Tariq H
sample_reviews.text: Great local supplier — they always have what I need in stock and the prices are very competitive. Easy to deal with and helpful staff.

sample_reviews.author: Steve M
sample_reviews.text: Handy trade counter on Stockport Road. Good range of plumbing parts and fittings. Saves me a trip into town every time.

sample_reviews.author: Dave R
sample_reviews.text: Been using Raja for my plumbing jobs around South Manchester for a couple of years. Reliable stock, good prices, and quick to serve.

brand.usp: Raja Plumbing Supplies is Levenshulme's trusted local trade counter, offering a wide range of plumbing components and fittings at competitive prices. We serve both trade professionals and homeowners across South Manchester with expert product knowledge and reliable stock.
brand.hero_headline: Quality Plumbing Supplies on Your Doorstep
brand.about_paragraph: We're Raja Plumbing Supplies, based right on Stockport Road in Levenshulme — a convenient stop for plumbers and homeowners across South Manchester. We stock everything from pipes and fittings to heating components and bathroom fixtures, all at trade-friendly prices. Whether you're a sole trader or a busy plumbing firm, we're here to get you what you need, fast.
